result.stdout:
Usage: andyx [command]

Buildersoft.Andy.X.Cli

Commands:
  tenant          Create and read tenants
  product         Create and read products
  component       Create and read components
  topic           Create and read topics
  subscription    Create and read subscriptions
  producer        Create and read producers
  cluster         Read Cluster configuration
  node            Connect and read node details
  authorize       Manage api keys and secrets for tenants, products and components
  retention       Manage life time of data at tenants, products and components

Options:
  --completion    Generate a shell completion code
  -h, --help      Show help message
  --version       Show version

Usage: andyx authorize [command]

Buildersoft.Andy.X.Cli

Commands:
  tenant       Manage tenant keys
  product      Manage product keys
  component    Manage component keys

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: andyx authorize [command]

Buildersoft.Andy.X.Cli

Commands:
  tenant       Manage tenant keys
  product      Manage product keys
  component    Manage component keys

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: andyx authorize component [--tenant <String>] [--product <String>] [--component <String>] [--issued-for <String>] [--description <String>] [--roles <ComponentTokenRole>...] [--expire-date <DateTime>] [--create] [--revoke] [--help] key

Manage component keys

Arguments:
  0: key    

Options:
  --tenant <String>                   (Required)
  --product <String>                  (Required)
  --component <String>                (Required)
  --issued-for <String>              Enter the name of the client you would like to grant access (Producer or Subscription)
  --description <String>             Token description
  --roles <ComponentTokenRole>...    Roles
  --expire-date <DateTime>           Expire date, date when the secret is valid, if is not set the default value is 2 years from this moment.
  --create                           Create or read Component Tokens, unset is read, set is create
  --revoke                           Revoke the given key, key should have value to be able to revoke a key
  -h, --help                         Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: andyx authorize component [--tenant <String>] [--product <String>] [--component <String>] [--issued-for <String>] [--description <String>] [--roles <ComponentTokenRole>...] [--expire-date <DateTime>] [--create] [--revoke] [--help] key

  --expire-date <DateTime>           Expire date, date when the secret is valid, if is not set the default value is 2 years from this moment.
  --create                           Create or read Component Tokens, unset is read, set is create
  --revoke                           Revoke the given key, key should have value to be able to revoke a key
  -h, --help                         Show help message

Usage: andyx authorize tenant [--tenant <String>] [--description <String>] [--roles <TenantTokenRole>...] [--expire-date <DateTime>] [--create] [--revoke] [--help] key

Manage tenant keys

Arguments:
  0: key    

Options:
  --tenant <String>                (Required)
  --description <String>          Token description
  --roles <TenantTokenRole>...    Roles, by default two roles will be asign Consume and Produce
  --expire-date <DateTime>        Expire date, date when the secret is valid, if is not set the default value is 2 years from this moment.
  --create                        Create or read Tenant Tokens, unset is read, set is create
  --revoke                        Revoke the given key, key should have value to be able to revoke a key
  -h, --help                      Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: andyx component [--tenant <String>] [--product <String>] [--settings] [--enable-topic-creation] [--enable-subscription-creation] [--enable-producer-creation] [--enable-authorization] [--enforce-schema-validation] [--create] [--update] [--help] component

Create and read components

Arguments:
  0: component    

Options:
  --tenant <String>                  (Required)
  --product <String>                 (Required)
  --settings                        If his property is set, you will interact with product settings
  --enable-topic-creation           Allow topic automatic creation from clients, default is 'true'
  --enable-subscription-creation    Allow subscription automatic creation from clients, default is 'true'
  --enable-producer-creation        Allow producers automatic creation from clients, default is 'true'
  --enable-authorization            Enable Authorization, default is 'false'
  --enforce-schema-validation       Enforce Schema Validation for topics created in this component, default is 'false'
  --create                          Create or read Component, unset is read, set is create
  --update                          If this property is set it will update the product settings, make sure to update all settings you want to update
  -h, --help                        Show help message

  --enable-authorization            Enable Authorization, default is 'false'
  --enforce-schema-validation       Enforce Schema Validation for topics created in this component, default is 'false'
  --create                          Create or read Component, unset is read, set is create

  -h, --help                        Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: andyx retention [command]

Buildersoft.Andy.X.Cli

Commands:
  tenant       Manage retention policies for tenant
  product      Manage retention policies for product
  component    Manage retention policies for component

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: andyx retention component [--tenant <String>] [--product <String>] [--component <String>] [--name <String>] [--type <RetentionType>] [--ttl <Int64>] [--create] [--update] [--delete] [--help] id

Manage retention policies for component

Arguments:
  0: id    

Options:
  --tenant <String>          (Required)
  --product <String>         (Required)
  --component <String>       (Required)
  --name <String>           Retention Policy Name, default is 'default_ttl'
  --type <RetentionType>    Retention Policy Type, default is SOFT_TTL. In case of update type can not change (Allowed values: SOFT_TTL, HARD_TTL)
  --ttl <Int64>             Time to live in minutes, default value is 43800 (one month)
  --create                  Create a retention policy for tenant, unset is read, set is create
  --update                  update a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is update
  --delete                  delete a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is delete
  -h, --help                Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: andyx subscription [--tenant <String>] [--product <String>] [--component <String>] [--topic <String>] [--type <SubscriptionType>] [--mode <SubscriptionMode>] [--initial-position <InitialPosition>] [--create] [--help] subscription

Create and read subscriptions

Arguments:
  0: subscription    

Options:
  --tenant <String>                        (Required)
  --product <String>                       (Required)
  --component <String>                     (Required)
  --topic <String>                         (Required)
  --type <SubscriptionType>               Subscription type, the default is 'Unique' (Allowed values: Unique, Failover, Shared)
  --mode <SubscriptionMode>               Subscription mode, the default value is 'NonResilient' (Allowed values: Resilient, NonResilient)
  --initial-position <InitialPosition>    Initial Position for subscription, the default value is 'Latest' (Allowed values: Earliest, Latest)
  --create                                Create or read Subscription, unset is read, set is create
  -h, --help                              Show help message
